title: Buck Rogers: Planet of Zoom Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Sega's forward-scrolling space combat game follows Buck Rogers through scaling tunnel sequences and open space battles, using sprite scaling to simulate depth as enemies grow from the horizon.
narrative.core_loop: Dodge incoming fire, destroy waves of scaling enemies, and survive tunnel gauntlets until the stage boss is cleared.

mechanics.map_notes: Sprite scaling simulates forward flight into oncoming enemy formations.
mechanics.expression: Sprite scaling simulates forward flight into oncoming enemy formations.

mechanics.map_notes: Vertical movement selects which altitude band enemies occupy in the faux-3D field.
mechanics.expression: Vertical movement selects which altitude band enemies occupy in the faux-3D field.

mechanics.map_notes: Stages are continuous forward-scroll gauntlets ending in a boss confrontation.
mechanics.expression: Stages are continuous forward-scroll gauntlets ending in a boss confrontation.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship weapons fire immediately on input.
mechanics.expression: Ship weapons fire immediately on input.

mechanics.map_notes: Hull integrity drops from collisions and enemy fire.
mechanics.expression: Hull integrity drops from collisions and enemy fire.

mechanics.map_notes: Extra ships awarded at score thresholds.
mechanics.expression: Extra ships awarded at score thresholds.

mechanics.map_notes: Enemies release expanding bullet fans as they scale closer.
mechanics.expression: Enemies release expanding bullet fans as they scale closer.

mechanics.map_notes: End-of-stage bosses repeat learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: End-of-stage bosses repeat learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Large craft flash before launching missile salvos.
mechanics.expression: Large craft flash before launching missile salvos.

mechanics.map_notes: Tunnel walls and narrow corridors force vertical lane changes.
mechanics.expression: Tunnel walls and narrow corridors force vertical lane changes.

mechanics.map_notes: Some bosses transform attack patterns after taking damage.
mechanics.expression: Some bosses transform attack patterns after taking damage.

mechanics.map_notes: Stage select after clearing prior zones.
mechanics.expression: Stage select after clearing prior zones.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Buck Rogers: Planet of Zoom through its core shooter loop.
